title: Multiplicity one for equivariant min-max theory in prescribed homology classes
abstract: For a closed Riemannian manifold $M$ with a compact Lie group $G$ acting by isometries, we show a generic multiplicity one theorem in equivariant min-max theory, and show in generic sense that there are infinitely many $G$-invariant minimal hypersurfaces in a fixed $G$-homology class. We also establish an equivariant min-max theory for $G$-invariant hypersurfaces of prescribed mean curvature with $G$-index upper bounds.
